title: chasaph #2834
definition:
1) to strip, strip off, lay bare, make bare, draw out
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to strip off
        1a2) to strip, lay bare
        1a3) to draw (water), skim, take from the surface
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to strip off
        1a2) to strip, lay bare
        1a3) to draw (water), skim, take from the surface

    NASB:  to strip off, strip, make bare
